detail.description:
# Super cool Idle RPG
# High-quality Retro Pixel RPG

An unknown crack in the dimension brought demons into this world... The world is in need of a hero, a SLAYER to put an end to the chaos. Become a Slayer and protect the world!

▶ ENDLESS IDLE GAME

Get rich rewards by being AFK!!
Just 10 minutes a day is enough to explore the fantasy world.

▶RETRO PIXEL INDIE GAME
Raising Slayer is a RPG story filled with adventure and action.
